positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a gentle cosmic whale breaching through deep space nebulae. The whale has bioluminescent patterns glowing in shades of turquoise, lavender, and electric blue. It is surrounded by intricate, flowing cosmic smoke and distant, stylized star constellations forming geometric patterns. The style should be a modern, clean vector art mixed with delicate watercolor textures, achieving high contrast against a deep, midnight indigo background. The composition must be centered, focusing on the whale's powerful, graceful silhouette. Excellent detail, suitable for apparel printing, flat graphic style, vibrant, cosmic energy, high contrast, clean lines.
negative: blur, text, watermarks, logo, signature, low detail, artifacts, ugly, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, photorealism
